import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        result = list.push(result, v)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut placed = false
  mut dup = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      0
    end
    if v == x
      dup = true
    end
    if not placed and not dup and v > x
      result = list.push(result, x)
      placed = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not placed and not dup
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn add_all(_ acc: List<Int>, _ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result = acc
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(w)
      w
    when None
      0
    end
    result = insert_sorted(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)
mut u: List<Int> = []
u = add_all(u, a)
u = add_all(u, b)

mut out = ""
let total = u.len()
mut k = 0
while k < total
  let v = match u.get(k)
  when Some(w)
    w
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
